Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.StoreManagement:CategoryNotDeleted: Category does not exist or is not deleted.
Texts.StoreManagement:CategoryHasProducts: Cannot delete category because it is already used by products.
Texts.StoreManagement:CategorySizeTypeCannotBe: Cannot change category size type because this category is already used by products.
Texts.StoreManagement:ProductVariantInvalidSiz: Variant size is not valid for this product category.
Texts.StoreManagement:ProductVariantHasStock: Cannot delete product variant because it has stock.
Texts.StoreManagement:ProductVariantCannotRest: Cannot restore product variant because another active variant with the same color and size already exists.
Texts.StoreManagement:ProductHasVariants: Cannot delete product because it has variants. Deactivate it instead.
Texts.StoreManagement:ProductVariantHasMovemen: Cannot delete product variant because it has stock movements. Deactivate it instead.
Texts.StoreManagement:InventoryManualMovementT: This inventory movement type cannot be created manually.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderTextTooLong: Order text value is too long.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderItemRequired: Order must contain at least one item.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderUnitPriceInvalid: Order item unit price is invalid.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderCannotBeConfirmed: Order cannot be confirmed in its current status.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderCannotBeCancelled: Order cannot be cancelled in its current status.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderCannotBeUpdated: Order cannot be updated in its current status.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderProductVariantNotFo: Order product variant does not exist.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderInsufficientStock: Insufficient stock for one or more order items.
Texts.StoreManagement:OrderCannotBeDeleted: Order cannot be deleted in its current status.
